releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.6.900

This production build sharpens sync responsiveness and moves more status into the main toolbar so background work is easier to read while Freed stays responsive.

### Improvements

- Safe local mutations now respond immediately instead of waiting behind heavier sync work.
- The background activity monitor now lives in the top toolbar, with collapsed feed controls keeping the toolbar usable at tighter widths.
- Cloud sync now shows elapsed activity status so long-running work is easier to understand.

### Fixes

- Hardened PWA sync hydration and Google Drive recovery paths.
- Kept settings, reader, story grid, and mobile menu interactions aligned with the latest product polish.

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
